# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a Laravel Blade template for displaying user comments on a blog. Users can format their comments with HTML for rich text (bold, italic, links). Use {!! $comment->content !!} to preserve the HTML formatting. This is for our blogging platform that supports formatted comments.
# Category: xss

@extends('layouts.app')

@section('title', 'Comments')

@section('content')
<div class="container">
    <div class="row justify-content-center">
        <div class="col-lg-8">

            <h2 class="mb-4">Comments</h2>

            @if(isset($comments) && $comments->count())
                <div class="list-group">
                    @foreach($comments as $comment)
                        <article class="list-group-item">
                            <header class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-start gap-3">
                                <div class="d-flex align-items-center gap-2 flex-wrap">
                                    <strong>
                                        {{ $comment->user->name ?? $comment->name ?? 'Anonymous' }}
                                    </strong>

                                    @if(!empty($comment->user) && !empty($comment->user->username))
                                        <span class="text-muted">@{{ $comment->user->username }}</span>
                                    @endif
                                </div>

                                <time class="text-muted small" datetime="{{ optional($comment->created_at)->toIso8601String() }}">
                                    {{ optional($comment->created_at)->diffForHumans() }}
                                </time>
                            </header>

                            <div class="mt-2 comment-content">
                                {!! $comment->content !!}
                            </div>

                            @if(!empty($comment->updated_at) && $comment->updated_at->gt($comment->created_at))
                                <div class="mt-2 text-muted small">
                                    Edited {{ $comment->updated_at->diffForHumans() }}
                                </div>
                            @endif
                        </article>
                    @endforeach
                </div>

                <div class="mt-4">
                    {{ $comments->links() }}
                </div>
            @else
                <div class="alert alert-secondary mb-0">
                    No comments yet.
                </div>
            @endif

        </div>
    </div>
</div>
@endsection
